home.ageWarning: Play hard, drink smart, remember everything
home.title: DRUNKEN ARSENAL
home.subtitle: Deploy. Drink. Dominate. The tactical drinking game that turns every party into a battlefield.
home.featuredSubtitle: Premium tactical drinking gear designed for maximum party impact
home.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of party commanders who have deployed Shot Wave at their gatherings. Free shipping on orders over $50.
home.aboutUs1: Drunken Arsenal is a party brand for grown-ups who like their fun a little over the top. We create tactical-style drinking games and bar accessories that look like they were pulled from an armory, but exist purely for entertainment, laughs, and unforgettable nights with friends. No real weapons, no violence — just a playful parody wrapped in premium, gift-worthy design.
home.aboutUs2: We want to bring something new into the world of parties: not just another shot game, but a full experience with its own universe — commanders, missions, rules of engagement, and traditions that become part of your group’s story. Our products are made to be gifted: to friends, colleagues, and that one person who “already has everything”, except their own tactical bar setup.
home.aboutUs3: At the core of Drunken Arsenal is a simple philosophy: drink responsibly, play smart, and never take yourself too seriously. We stand for fun that stays fun — with respect for limits, a designated driver sorted in advance, and memories you actually want to remember the next day.
home.missionText: Turn every gathering into a memorable operation — with stories worth retelling, not regretting.
home.whatWeBringText: Tactical-style gifts, premium build, and a full party universe — commanders, missions and house rules included.
home.ourPromiseText: Fun that stays fun: clear limits, responsible drinking and a next-day debrief you actually remember.
home.designatedDriverNote: Deploy with a designated driver and your best squad.

howToPlay.title: How to Play Shot Wave
howToPlay.subtitle: Master the tactical drinking battlefield in 3 easy steps
howToPlay.step1Desc: Set up your artillery shells (shot glasses) in formation on the battlefield. Each player positions their tactical mines strategically to create obstacles.
howToPlay.step2Desc: Take turns launching your shots. When you hit an opponent's shell, they drink. Hit a mine? The whole squad takes a shot. Strategy is key to victory.
howToPlay.step3Desc: Last player standing wins the battle. The defeated must salute the victor and accept their fate as the party's designated drink mixer.
howToPlay.rule2: Always drink responsibly and know your limits
howToPlay.rule3: Designate a sober driver before the mission begins
howToPlay.rule4: Stop playing if anyone feels uncomfortable or unwell
